items.name: Set Menu 1 (1 course, per person)
items.description: Entrees: Pulau; Chicken Curry/Goat Curry; Mix Veg/Aalu Tama; Tomato Achar/Mix Achar; Rajma/Mattar Paneer; Papad/Spring Roll. Price excluding GST. Catering for groups of 15 or more; event bookings minimum 20 guests.

items.name: Set Menu 2 (1 course, per person)
items.description: Entrees: Furandhana; Chicken Choila/Chicken Roast; Mix Achar/Aalu Sadeko; Springroll/Papad/Prawn; Pulau/Jira Rice; Goat Curry/Chicken Curry; Mix Veg/Aalu Tama/Rajma; Tomato Achar/Rasbari. Price excluding GST. Catering for groups of 15 or more; event bookings minimum 20 guests.

items.name: Set Menu 3 (2 course, per person)
items.description: Entrees: Furandana/Bhuteko Chiura; Mix Achar/Aalu Sadeko; Chicken Choila/Chicken Roast/Chicken Chilli; Soyabinko Achar/Bhatmas Sadeko; Papad/Spring Roll. Main Meal: Pulau/Jira Rice; Goat Curry/Chicken Curry; Mattar Paneer/Rajma; Aalu Tama Bodi/Mix Veg; Tomato Achar; Rasbari. Price excluding GST. Catering for groups of 15 or more; event bookings minimum 20 guests.

items.name: Set Menu 4 (2 course, per person)
items.description: Entrees: Furandhana/Bhuteko Chiura; Mix Achar/Aalu Sadeko; Chicken Choila/Goat Choila/Buff Choila; Chiken Chilli/Patato Chilli; Papad/Spring Roll/Bhatmas Sadeko; MoMo/Chiken Roast/Fish Fry. Main Meal: Pulau/Jira Rice; Goat Curry/Chicken Curry/Lamb Curry; Mattar Paneer/Rajma; Aalu Tama Bodi/Mix Veg; Rasbari/Gajar Ko Haluwa/Fruit Salad. Price excluding GST. Catering for groups of 15 or more; event bookings minimum 20 guests.

items.name: Set Menu 5 (2 course, per person)
items.description: Entrees: Furandhana/Bhuteko Chiura; Mix Achar/Aalu Sadeko; Chicken Choila/Goat Choila/Buff Choila; Chicken Chilli/Patato Chilli/Paneer Chilli; Papad/Spring roll/Prawn; Chiken Roast/Fish Fry; Bhatmas Sadeko; Bhutan/MoMo. Main Meal: Pulau/Jira Rice/Plain Rice; Goat Curry/Chicken Curry/Lamb Curry; Fish curry/Butter Chicken; Mattar Paneer/Rajma; Aalu Tama Bodi/Mix veg; Rasbari With Yoghurt/Gajar Ko Haluwa/Fruit Salad. Price excluding GST. Catering for groups of 15 or more; event bookings minimum 20 guests.

items.name: Set Menu 6 (2 course, per person)
items.description: Entrees: Furandhana/Bhuteko Chiura; Mix Achar/Aalu Sadeko; Chicken Choila/Goat Choila/Buff Choila/Pork Choila; Chicken Chilli/Pork Chilli/Patato Chilli/Paneer Chilli; Papad/Spring Roll/Bhatmas Sadeko; Chikden Roast/Fish Fry; Goat Sekuwa/Lamb Sekuwa/Chicken Tandoori; Bhutan/Sukuti Sadeko; Mo:Mo Chilli/Mo:Mo Steam/Mo:Mo Fry. Main Meal: Pulau/Jira Rice/Plain Rice; Goat Curry/Chicken Curry/Lamb Curry; Fish curry/Butter Chicken; Mattar Paneer/Rajma; Aalu Tama Bodi/Mix veg; Rasbari With Yoghurt/Gajar Ko Haluwa/Fruit Salad/Rasmalai. Price excluding GST. Catering for groups of 15 or more; event bookings minimum 20 guests.

items.name: Kid's Menu (per person)
items.description: Chicken Nugget, Chips, Chowmein. Price excluding GST.
